name: chaos-duration
description: Set chaos duration (in sec) as desired

name: vmi-name
description: The VirtualMachineInstance name to target (if label selector not specified)

name: label-selector
description: VMI label selector used to target one or more VMIs by label
validation_message: Label selector must be in the format: key=value

name: namespace
description: Namespace where the target VMI is running

name: instance-count
description: Number of instances to target if more than one is selected by the LABEL_SELECTOR

name: execution
description: When multiple VMIs are selected the execution on all of them can be performed in parallel or serial

name: ingress
description: Incoming network traffic will have chaos applied

name: egress
description: Outgoing network traffic will have chaos applied

name: interfaces
short_description: Network interfaces to apply chaos (comma separated)
description: Network interfaces to apply chaos on (if more than one separated by comma eg. eth0,eth1,eth2)
validation_message: Network interfaces must be in the format: eth0 or a comma separated list eth0,eth1,eth2

name: latency
description: Network latency to inject into the target VMI traffic (eg. 50ms, 100ms)
validation_message: Latency must be a value followed by ms or s, eg. 50ms or 2s

name: loss
description: Packet loss percentage to inject into the target VMI traffic (eg. 0.02 for 2%, 0.5 for 50%)
validation_message: Loss must be a decimal value between 0 and 1, eg. 0.02 for 2%

name: bandwidth
description: Bandwidth limit to inject into the target VMI traffic (eg. 100mbit, 1gbit)
validation_message: Bandwidth must be a value followed by mbit, gbit or kbit, eg. 100mbit

name: image
short_description: The network chaos injection workload container image
description: The network chaos injection workload container image

name: taints
short_description: The list of tolerations for the network chaos workload
description: The list of tolerations that can be assigned to the network chaos workload (comma separated)

name: service-account
short_description: The service account for the VMI network chaos workload
description: The service account associated with the VMI Network Chaos workload
